disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Near-blackout and dizziness triggered by standing up, with an inability to stay upright, in the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: Does anything bring on the dizziness?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: As soon as she stood up everything went black and she nearly collapsed. It only happens when she stands or sits up quickly — lying flat she feels a bit better.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recurrent nausea, vomiting and vague abdominal pain over the past week, severely limiting oral intake and hydration
trigger_question_examples: Has she been able to keep food and fluids down?
Any nausea, vomiting or tummy pain?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: She's been really nauseous and vomiting on and off for about a week, with a dull belly ache, and she can barely keep any water down now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss and loss of appetite building gradually over the preceding months
trigger_question_examples: Has her weight or appetite changed over the last few months?
Has this been building for a while?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, she's lost quite a bit of weight without trying and her appetite has been poor for months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Strong craving for salt over recent weeks
trigger_question_examples: Has she had any unusual cravings, like for salty foods?
Any change in what she feels like eating?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes actually — she's been craving salt a lot, adding it to everything and even eating it straight, which isn't like her.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Darkening of the skin, most noticeable in the palm creases, inside the mouth and over recent scars, developing gradually
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in the colour of her skin?
Does she look more tanned than usual, especially in the palm creases or gums?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Come to think of it, her skin has looked darker lately — the creases of her palms, her gums and even an old scar look like they've tanned, and she hasn't been in the sun.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not on any regular prescribed medication — in particular no blood-pressure tablets, diuretics or steroids
trigger_question_examples: Is she on any regular medications?
Does she take any steroids or blood-pressure tablets?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, she isn't on any regular tablets at all — nothing for blood pressure, no water tablets, no steroids. Just the anti-nausea one she bought recently.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound generalised muscle weakness and body aches, now leaving the patient effectively bedbound
trigger_question_examples: How is her strength — can she move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Her muscles ache and she has no strength — she can't get out of bed without help now.
